if.if: (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT r.*, (SELECT name FROM member WHERE no = r.writer) AS writer_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE parent_no = r.no) AS comment_count FROM reply r
ORDER BY gno DESC, ono ASC LIMIT #{startIdx}, #{size}
mapper.update: UPDATE reply SET gno = #{no} WHERE no = #{no}
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, (SELECT name FROM member WHERE no = r.writer) AS writer_name FROM reply r WHERE r.no = #{no}
mapper.update: UPDATE reply SET readcnt = readcnt + 1 WHERE no = #{no}
UPDATE reply SET filename_org = NULL, filename_real = NULL WHERE no = #{no}
UPDATE reply SET ono = ono + 1 WHERE gno = #{gno} AND ono > #{ono}
